title: plan replayer can't capture the same sql + plan digest multiple times
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users(id Int32, name String, age Nullable(Int32), created_at DateTime DEFAULT now());
INSERT INTO users(id, name, age) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 30);
INSERT INTO users(id, name, age) VALUES (2, 'Bob', NULL);
SELECT * FROM users WHERE age IS NULL;
ALTER TABLE users UPDATE age = 25 WHERE name = 'Alice';
key_bug_features: plan replayer can't capture same SQL multiple times
